curation.synopsis: Three boys from the underhive gangs of Hive Trazior on Necromunda — Lexandro d'Arquebus, Yeremi Valance and Biff Tundrish — are dragged into the Imperial Fists' induction programme. The novel follows their gene-seed implantation, scout trials and ascension to full battle-brother status, closing on a First Company boarding action inside a Tyranid bioship. A Bildungsroman in three POVs — Lexandro's ascetic discipline, Yeremi's intuitive aggression, Biff's bawdy loyalty — set against the chapter's iron Codex orthodoxy. The third Warhammer 40,000 novel ever published (Games Workshop, 1993), and the structural template for every later path-to-Astartes story.

sources: Black Library / Lexicanum: novel sold under the Heretic Tomes brand
flags.reasoning: Black Library currently distributes the novel under its *Heretic Tomes* label, reserved for works no longer consistent with current Warhammer 40,000 canon. The 1993 lore around Imperial Fists recruitment, gene-seed rites, and the now-removed Squat sub-faction has been retconned. Roster correctly lists the book as a 40K novel; this flag is informational for the recommender so it can de-weight or contextualise canonicity-drift entries in Ask-the-Archive results.
